codeReview.summary: Reviewed output module findings file (.factory/reviews/output_findings.json). Found 3 High-severity blocking bugs (unwrap/expect panics in SDK export), 6 valid Medium issues (one finding incorrectly stated missing SAFETY comments - they exist at lines 91/109 in sdk_export.rs), 6 Low quality issues, and 4 positive architecture observations. Worker correctly identified issues with specific file paths and line references.

issues.description: Valid finding: .unwrap() on input_ctx.stream(video_stream_idx) could panic if stream indices become invalid after seek operations. Should use .with_context() for graceful error handling.
Valid finding: .unwrap() on input_ctx.stream(audio_idx) could panic if audio stream lookup fails after seek. Should use .with_context() for graceful error handling.
Valid finding: Three consecutive .unwrap() calls on scaler.as_ref().unwrap() in condition checks. If scaler becomes None, this panics during thumbnail generation.
Valid finding: .expect("scaler") could panic if scaler initialization silently failed. Should use .context() for error handling.

Finding correction needed: The Medium finding 'Unsafe codec_tag clearing needs explicit safety documentation' at lines 95/113 in sdk_export.rs is incorrect. SAFETY comments DO exist at lines 91 and 109. This finding should be removed or marked as resolved.

Additional observation not in findings: unsafe block clearing codec_tag at line 82 lacks explicit SAFETY comment (unlike lines 91/109 in sdk_export.rs which have them). Consider adding SAFETY comment for consistency.
Additional observation not in findings: unsafe { (*frame.as_ptr()).linesize[0] } at line 284 lacks SAFETY comment documenting why accessing AVFrame internals is safe.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The codebase partially follows SAFETY comment convention for unsafe blocks (sdk_export.rs has SAFETY comments at lines 91/109), but sdk_ffmpeg_output.rs lacks SAFETY comments at lines 82, 284, and the unsafe fn at line 12. This inconsistency suggests the SAFETY comment pattern is emerging but not yet uniformly applied.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Grep for 'SAFETY:' shows comments at sdk_export.rs:91 and sdk_export.rs:109, but sdk_ffmpeg_output.rs unsafe blocks at lines 12, 82, 284 lack them. AGENTS.md does not explicitly document this convention.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md and architecture.md correctly document the Bytes-based packet handling pattern and memory management (MAX_OUTSTANDING_SNAPSHOT_BYTES: 512MB). No gaps identified - the worker correctly understood the architecture.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: architecture.md section on Memory Management documents bytes::Bytes usage and MAX_OUTSTANDING_SNAPSHOT_BYTES. Worker findings reference these patterns correctly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed module-reviewer skill procedure correctly. Used pattern-based grep searches for .unwrap(), .expect(), and unsafe blocks. Produced structured findings JSON with severity categories. Skill feedback shows followedProcedure: true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker-transcripts.jsonl shows workerSessionId 753e3643-ce84-4535-a9e2-bba973dc041a with skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true, deviations: []. Handoff shows findingsFile and findingsCount structure matching skill example.

blockingIssues.description: Potential panic from .unwrap() on video stream lookup after seek - could crash during clip export
Potential panic from .unwrap() on audio stream lookup after seek - could crash during clip export
Potential panic from .unwrap() chain in scaler validation - could crash during thumbnail generation
Potential panic from .expect("scaler") - could crash during preview frame extraction

nonBlockingIssues.description: Medium finding incorrectly stated SAFETY comments missing at sdk_export.rs:95/113 - they exist at lines 91/109
Missing SAFETY comment for unsafe block clearing codec_tag
Missing SAFETY comment for unsafe block accessing AVFrame linesize

summary: The output module review findings are largely accurate with 4 blocking issues (potential panics from unwrap/expect in SDK export and preview code). One Medium finding about missing SAFETY comments is incorrect - SAFETY comments DO exist at the cited location in sdk_export.rs. Two additional unsafe blocks in sdk_ffmpeg_output.rs lack SAFETY comments and should be documented. The worker correctly followed the module-reviewer skill procedure. The blocking issues (4 potential panics) must be fixed before user testing to prevent application crashes during clip export or thumbnail generation.
